subcodes.first_line: O thou who art dishonored for the love of God! Though in the sight of men the friends of God would have thee be disgraced, yet God hath ordained this dishonor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رسوای محبت الله اگر بظاهر خلق رسواای احباء الله خواستند لکن حق آن رسواایرا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
